calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Mandy G. Leigh of Leigh Law Group (415-480-6150), appears for petitioner/moving party, Arthur Johnson

Attorney, Jennifer M. Lynch of Gordon & Rees, LLP (415-986-5900), appears for respondent/opposing party, The Regents of the University of California

The Court having issued via email a tentative ruling the cause is argued by both sides. PETITIONER ARTHUR JOHNSON's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus is taken under submission. Petitioner's Request for statement of decision is denied.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Continued To Jul-13-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. Court adopts its tentative ruling with modification as follows:

The motion is continued to a date yet-to-be determined, to be heard by Judge Joseph M. Quinn in Department 302. The clerk of the court shall inform counsel of the new date, time.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)

Later this same date, Court confirms time and date:

PETITIONER ARTHUR JOHNSON'S Motion For Writ Of Mandamus is continued to July 13, at 2:00 PM in Dept. 302, to be heard by Judge Joseph M. Quinn. Court clerk notifies counsel via email.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter:Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Record
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JAY T. JAMBECK, ESQ. of Leigh Law Group, Tel No. 415-480-6150 appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. JENNIFER M. LYNCH, ESQ. of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel No. 415-986-5900 appearing for Respondent the Regents of the University of California.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. PETITIONER ARTHUR JOHNSON'S Motion To Augment Record is denied. Opposing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order for the Court's signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Record
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Jan-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER ARTHUR JOHNSON's Motion To Augment Record - The Pro Tem Judge recuses herself from hearing this motion. The motion will be heard on January 5, 2016, at 9:00 a.m. in department 301. Judge Pro tem: Margaret Niver; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Record

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ARTHUR JOHNSON'S Motion To Augment Record is continued to December 16, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302, Discovery, on the Court's own motion.
